content: Welcome to English Advance.
A free vocabulary pack designed to
prevent you from being held back by
paperwork. Forms, emails, signs, official
letters, and the small print that you
must follow, that isn't clearly explained.
500 words across 5 tiers. By the end,
the documents that might have slowed you
down, will become familiar and manageable.
Don't let paperwork hold you back. Remove
this obstacle from your life and advance.
You may not need the lessons. You can
Skip the current lesson with 0 or disable
lessons with 8 so they don't come back.
FlashBoss combines flashcards with a
progressive syllabus, held together
with basic reference lessons, masters
who manage your workflow, and level
testing as a battle to graduate
clusters and move forward.
Each card presents a new word, an
example sentence of appropriately
graded language built from words you
have mostly already learned, and
translations of both.
Repeating the vocabulary word and
example sentence aloud is strongly
recommended for retention.
Pressing 8 will turn off a lesson
Filling out forms is a huge part of
successfully navigating adult life.
This tier teaches every word you will
find on a standard form.
Addresses, documents, instructions,
and categories like 'employed' or
'self-employed.' After this tier,
no form will look strange to you.
You will know exactly what every
field is asking for.
Quick tip: if a field does not apply
to you, write N/A. It stands for
'not applicable' and means 'this
question is not relevant to me.'
Forms tell you how to fill them in.
Here are the most basic instructions
to get you started.
Block capitals: write in ALL CAPS.
See overleaf: turn the page over.
Delete as appropriate: cross out
the options that do not apply.
Please print: write in separate
letters, not joined-up writing.
In ink: use a pen, not a pencil.
These are the rules that always
apply. You will see these exact
phrases on almost every official
form you encounter. After this
cluster you will recognise all of
them without thinking twice.
